source: HUD MTSP Income Limits (demo freeze for RealDoor)
area: Boston-Cambridge-Quincy, MA-NH HUD Metro FMR Area
formulaNotes: Annual household income is compared to the MTSP limit for household size at the selected AMI percentage.
LIHTC units commonly use 50% or 60% AMI (MTSP) limits; this demo freezes both.
This calculator never labels a renter eligible or ineligible — it only shows confirmed income vs published threshold.
